Evaluation Fragility.reason: HAR and Optical supported protocol-sensitive effects, but controls keep scope bounded.

Protocol Sensitivity.reason: Supported by HAR and Optical; Landsat effect was weaker in this run.

Random-Split Inflation.reason: Not universal: Letter, digits, Vehicle linear, and Shuttle forest weakened broad inflation language.

Rare-Class Metric Illusion.reason: Shuttle supported class/metric explanation more strongly than duplicate transfer.

Protocol Ambiguity Barrier.reason: Vehicle deep study preserved ambiguity as a real blocker.

Leakage-vs-Difficulty Differentiation.reason: Duplicate mechanisms were downgraded when direct evidence was absent, separating leakage-like claims from ordinary difficulty.
